items.title: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25
items.summary: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams, who featured in all three of his country's group matches at this summer's World Cup, has died aged 25, a government minister has confirmed.

items.summary: Jurgen Klopp agrees a deal in principle to become the new head coach of Germany's men's national team after the resignation of Julian Nagelsmann.
